human_question: Does the full paper support using Beefy-9/B8 plus recombinant albumin as the positive serum-free bovine expansion anchor, and what exact doubling-time/passaging claims should be recorded?
decision_impact: Sets positive control and minimum performance target for first experiment.
suggested_action: Extract exact formulation, dose levels, passage counts, doubling times, and myogenic marker results.

human_question: What FGF2 concentrations were tested, which concentrations preserved short-term and long-term growth, and where did morphology suffer?
decision_impact: Determines whether FGF2 can be a first-round dose variable and the lower bound to test.
suggested_action: Record exact tested FGF2 range and classify safe/reduced/removal levels.

human_question: Which recombinant albumin concentration and source were used in Beefy-9/Beefy-9+, and how did cost/performance change?
decision_impact: Defines albumin/substitute axis and control formulation.
suggested_action: Extract albumin source, g/L or mg/mL, and cost-performance notes.

human_question: Which components and concentrations made the Kolkmann chemically defined medium animal-free and effective for primary bovine satellite cell expansion?
decision_impact: Adds direct CD/AF formulation source beyond Beefy-9.
suggested_action: Extract full component table, supplements, attachment conditions, and endpoint values.

human_question: Did cells expanded in the chemically defined medium retain differentiation capacity, and what marker/assay proves it?
decision_impact: Controls risk that expansion medium harms downstream meat-relevant phenotype.
suggested_action: Record markers, assay timing, and comparison condition.

human_question: Which commercial chemically defined serum-free media supported primary bovine myoblast growth, and how did they compare with serum-containing medium?
decision_impact: Prevents overclaiming that any commercial SFM is adequate.
suggested_action: Record media names, 6-day proliferation data, morphology notes, and limitations.

human_question: Which ligands/receptors enabled serum-free myogenic differentiation, and are any of these also plausible expansion-stage risks or constraints?
decision_impact: Defines identity-preservation check and later differentiation compatibility.
suggested_action: Extract IGF1R/TFRC/LPAR1-related ligands, markers, and whether expansion formulation should avoid differentiation induction.

human_question: Which consumed nutrients/metabolites differed by species/cell type, and which findings justify avoiding cross-species transfer?
decision_impact: Supports bovine-only first target and in-silico robustness checks.
suggested_action: Extract bovine-relevant spent-media findings and any reusable assay recommendations.

human_question: Can the microalga-derived nutrient and conditioned-medium system be decomposed into controllable, reproducible variables for first-round testing?
decision_impact: Determines whether algae/extract class enters first batch or remains exploratory.
suggested_action: Extract CVE dose, conditioned medium fraction, growth effect, and reproducibility caveats.

human_question: What factors and levels were screened by DOE/RSM, and which optimized formulation should seed the search space?
decision_impact: Major source for bounded search-space ranges and interaction warnings.
suggested_action: Extract factor list, low/high levels, optimal recipe, response metrics, and validation data.

human_question: Did the DOE/RSM formulation preserve proliferative attributes and myogenic identity over longer culture?
decision_impact: Determines whether it can be a wet-lab positive control or just a short-term screen hit.
suggested_action: Record long-term assay length, live assays, transcriptomics summary, and warnings.

human_question: Which low-cost food-grade alternatives to serum albumin worked in B8/B9 for bovine muscle stem cells, and at what concentration?
decision_impact: Defines first cost-reduction candidate class.
suggested_action: Extract substitute identity, dose, performance relative to albumin, and food-grade status.

human_question: Is the albumin substitute acting as carrier/stabilizer, nutrient, or undefined bioactive mixture?
decision_impact: Controls biological plausibility gate and risk labels.
suggested_action: Assign mechanism class and note unknown composition risk.

human_question: What media components interacted with bFGF in bovine satellite proliferation, and what were the tested levels?
decision_impact: Informs whether one-factor-at-a-time FGF2 reduction is unsafe.
suggested_action: Extract DOE design, factor levels, interaction terms, and effect direction.

human_question: Which plant or insect protein isolates improved bovine satellite-cell proliferation, and which violate animal-component-free preference?
decision_impact: Determines if isolates are first-round candidates or split into ACF vs non-ACF tracks.
suggested_action: Extract isolate source, dose, performance, and animal-origin classification.

human_question: Are the protein isolates sufficiently characterized for reproducible medium optimization?
decision_impact: Controls whether isolate candidates can enter first round or remain exploratory.
suggested_action: Record composition data, certificate/spec needs, and batch-risk notes.

human_question: Do attachment-promoting compounds alter proliferation independently of microcarrier type, or are they process-coupled?
decision_impact: Decides if any attachment compound belongs in first 2D round.
suggested_action: Mark process-coupled unless evidence supports 2D medium-only relevance.

human_question: Which markers and p38-related conditions best indicate bovine satellite-cell stemness preservation?
decision_impact: Defines low-cost identity QC for wet-lab entry packet.
suggested_action: Extract marker panel, assay timing, and any intervention not allowed in first medium-only round.

human_question: Which parts of the C2C12 multi-objective Bayesian optimization protocol transfer to bovine medium design, and which are species-specific?
decision_impact: Shapes in-silico validation and first-batch diversity criteria.
suggested_action: Extract objective definitions, batch size, fidelity assumptions, and non-transferable biology.

human_question: What nonlinear DOE practices should be adopted before trusting BO-generated candidate formulations?
decision_impact: Reduces trial-and-error by making first wet-lab batch statistically interpretable.
suggested_action: Extract replicate and factor-screening recommendations.

human_question: Does reduced-serum optimization offer any method or metric useful for serum-free bovine design, without reintroducing serum?
decision_impact: Prevents scope drift back to serum-containing optimization.
suggested_action: Use method only; flag any serum-containing output as not first-round compliant.

human_question: Which hydrolysate mechanisms are supported for muscle cells, and which have direct bovine evidence?
decision_impact: Decides if hydrolysates are exploratory only or design-space candidates.
suggested_action: Map hydrolysate sources to direct/indirect evidence grades.

human_question: What safety or residue testing is relevant before interpreting growth-factor-heavy formulations as food-relevant?
decision_impact: Adds non-performance annotations to formulation table.
suggested_action: Record recommended analytical methods and limitations.

human_question: Are there safety concerns or species-specific detection issues for FGF2, IGF, TGF-beta, insulin, or transferrin?
decision_impact: Informs growth-factor risk labels and reporting language.
suggested_action: Extract qualitative safety notes, not as pass/fail toxicology claims.

human_question: Which component classes should be treated as essential vs candidates for removal in bovine expansion media?
decision_impact: Shapes search-space pruning before wet-lab.
suggested_action: Extract review recommendations and map to bovine direct evidence.

human_question: What omics or metabolic data would make serum-free medium design more rational, and what can be deferred?
decision_impact: Defines self-validation additions after first wet-lab round.
suggested_action: Record data requirements and defer advanced omics until basic medium gate passes.

human_question: Which components dominate serum-free medium cost across reviews, and are those also dominant in bovine formulas?
decision_impact: Prioritizes cost-reduction variables and avoids optimizing cheap irrelevant components.
suggested_action: Compare review cost drivers with Beefy-9/Kolkmann/Skrivergaard formulas.

human_question: What media attributes are required for cultivated meat success beyond proliferation?
decision_impact: Adds gate checks for food-grade plausibility and sensory risk.
suggested_action: Translate review-level requirements into manifest columns and design packet checklist.

human_question: What, if anything, from chicken high-density serum-free culture can inform bovine medium design without transferring unsupported biology?
decision_impact: Records why chicken is deferred but not ignored.
suggested_action: Extract only process/economic lessons, not formulation priors.

human_question: Which economic/process assumptions make chicken animal-free continuous manufacturing successful, and why are they outside first round?
decision_impact: Keeps first round focused while preserving second-phase roadmap.
suggested_action: Summarize transferable cost-accounting concepts and non-transferable process variables.
